title: Research the top 10 passive income opportunities for a senior data engineer / en
board_rationale: Identify and detail the top 10 passive income opportunities for a senior data engineer/entrepreneur in 2025-2026.. Conduct thorough web research to identify emerging trends and successful case studies in passive income opportunities relevant to data engineers. Synthesize findings into actionable insights with specific examples and steps.
chief_of_staff_plan:
Objective: Identify and detail the top 10 passive income opportunities for a senior data engineer/entrepreneur in 2025-2026.
Strategy: Conduct thorough web research to identify emerging trends and successful case studies in passive income opportunities relevant to data engineers. Synthesize findings into actionable insights with specific examples and steps.
Route: Execute plan with standard governance
Concerns: Current trends and projections for passive income opportunities in 2025-2026; Real examples of successful individuals in these fields; Accurate estimates for income potential, startup costs, and time to first revenue
Risk: yellow
